flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at West Los Angeles College rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($590 → $700).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at West Los Angeles College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at West Los Angeles College rose 14% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.5k → $4.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at West Los Angeles College rose 138% between 2007 and 2010 (4.3k → 10.2k).
